sentences.translation: Džuma je važan dan za muslimane.
sentences.translationEn: Friday is an important day for Muslims.

sentences.arabic: يَذْهَبُ الرِّجَالُ إِلَى المَسْجِدِ لِصَلَاةِ الجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci idu u džamiju na džuma-namaz.
sentences.translationEn: Men go to the mosque for Friday prayer.
They listen to the sermon before the prayer.
After the prayer, they talk with each other.

sentences.translation: Ovaj dan je vrijeme za odmor i porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: This day is a time for rest and family.
